system-health-dashboard-validator.evidence: AdminDashboard tabs: System Health (feeds + AI + users KPIs and incidents via data_feeds, feed_run_log, ai_credit_ledger, audit_logs), API Status (AdminApiControls on edge_function_controls), Feature Flags (AdminFeatureFlags on feature_flags + subscriptions), Audit Log (AdminAuditLog on audit_logs) — all via TanStack Query or hooks, with loading/empty/error states.

hub-shell-detector.evidence: AdminDashboard is a non-shell admin surface: LIVE data from Supabase tables, actionable tiles/links, export to CSV, and full state coverage (skeletons, error, initializing, populated).

scope: ADMIN-POWER-01 Product Power WO: unified Admin control center dashboard with tabs for System Health, API Status, Feature Flags, and Audit Log, powered by live Supabase telemetry.
